reconfirms.VAL-BILLING-014: M2F3 implemented the profile-side period rollover with a forward-compatible no-op for usage_counters. Now that the table exists (M3F1), invoice.paid fully resets messages_used + crawl_pages_used and rolls period_start/end on usage_counters.

whatWasImplemented: src/app/api/stripe/webhook/route.ts — handleInvoicePaid now issues a real UPDATE on usage_counters (messages_used=0, crawl_pages_used=0, period_start/end rolled to the invoice window, updated_at=now()). files_stored and openai_tokens_used are intentionally preserved — storage is cumulative across billing periods and token attribution is long-term.
Removed the pre-M3 try/catch guard that existed only to tolerate a missing usage_counters table. With the table now present, the update is a first-class operation.

src/__tests__/quota-reset.test.ts — 3 integration tests: (1) reset zeros messages_used + crawl_pages_used, preserves files_stored, rolls period_start/end; (2) post-reset the increment RPC succeeds from 0 (VAL-QUOTA-006 recovery story); (3) duplicate invoice.paid with a preserved intermediate mutation survives — idempotency via processed_stripe_events (VAL-QUOTA-010 re-confirmation from the quota side).

verification.testsRun: pnpm vitest run — 319 passed / 1 skipped / 45 files (+3 new).

manualChecks.action: invoice.paid with seed counters (messages:150, crawl:42, files:7)

filesChanged: src/app/api/stripe/webhook/route.ts (modified — full reset, no more try/catch)
